brands.name: Sika

profiles.title: Sika | LinkedIn
profiles.description: Sika | 1,195,326 followers on LinkedIn. Sustainability and innovation drive us to deliver high-performance solutions. Building trust beyond the expected. | Sika is a specialty chemicals company with a globally leading position in the development and production of systems and products for bonding, sealing, damping, reinforcing, and protection in the building sector and industrial manufacturing. Sika has subsidiaries in 102 countries around the world and, in over 400 factories, produces innovative technologies for customers worldwide. In doing so, it plays a crucial role in enabling the transformation of the construction and transportation sector toward greater environmental compatibility.

brands.name: Fosroc

profiles.title: Fosroc | LinkedIn
profiles.description:
Fosroc | 199,420 followers on LinkedIn. A world leader in the development and delivery of Constructive Solutions | Fosroc is a leading global manufacturer of construction chemicals, dedicated to enhancing the performance, durability, and sustainability of buildings and structures. Our innovative products address construction challenges, enabling professionals to achieve exceptional results in diverse environments.

By leveraging our expertise in material chemistry, Fosroc products significantly improve buildings in the following ways:

Strength & Durability: Our concrete admixtures enhance the strength, workability, and durability of concrete, resulting in robust buildings that withstand heavy loads, harsh weather, and long-term wear and tear.

brands.name: MYK Laticrete

profiles.title: MYK LATICRETE India Pvt. Ltd. | LinkedIn
profiles.description:
MYK LATICRETE India Pvt. Ltd. | 51,319 followers on LinkedIn. MYK LATICRETE stands out as a key player in transforming the landscape of tile and stone installation materials in India, setting the bar for contemporary global standards. Leading the way in the market, the company not only addresses fundamental industry needs but also disrupts conventional methods, offering a comprehensive range of tile adhesives, tile grouts, stone care products, and a variety of cleaners.

Guided by a strong customer-centric approach and an unwavering commitment to impeccable quality, MYK LATICRETE maintains its leadership position through continuous innovation.

brands.name: Bostik India

profiles.title: Bostik | LinkedIn
profiles.description:
Bostik | 154,231 followers on LinkedIn. As the adhesive segment of the Arkema group, we are committed to sustainable solutions that shape a circular future. | For over 130 years, Bostik, the adhesive solutions segment of Arkema, has been a leading global adhesive specialist in industrial, construction and consumer markets. 

With a presence in more than 40 countries and employing 7,000 people, Bostik’s broad technology portfolio, extensive industry knowledge and synergies with Arkema enable our company to meet a diverse range of customers’ evolving needs around the world. 

For the industrial market, Bostik’s smart solutions are found in today’s leading aerospace, transportation and packaging brands, improving operational efficiencies and overall product quality.
